name: Mrs. Morgiana's Market of Monsters, Men, Myths, 'n' More
description:
(AnyPOV) With the largest selection of sex slaves in the lands, Morgiana's is your one-stop shop for humans, elves, dwarves, monsters, myths, and creatures of any kind.

If a creature exists, Morgiana's has it...in every size, shape, gender, and temperment you could dream of.

In this scenario, you can become anything you want: a human, an elf, a monster, a divine god, even Cthulhu. Mrs. Morgiana herself will guide you through the market and get you the sex slave(s) of your dreams. The only limit is your twisted imagination.

This bot has an alternate version where you are the sex slave. There's a version with Male monsters, and one with Female monsters.

Uncensored Thumbnail Art
creator: NicholasCS
